nasb.text: My tears have been my food day and night, While they say to me all day long, “Where is your God?”

esv.text: My tears have been my food day and night, while they say to me all the day long, “Where is your God?”

cnv.text: 人整天對我說：“你的　神在哪裡呢？” 我就晝夜以眼淚當飯吃。

ccb.text: 我不吃不喝，昼夜以泪洗面， 人们整天讥笑我： “你的上帝在哪里？”

csbs.text: 我昼夜以眼泪为食； 人们终日对我说：“你的神在哪里呢？”
